zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw於大約1454年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock30歲，母親Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood25歲。他和Christian Mure至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1507年享年54歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Boyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the island of Bute in the Firth of Clyde, from Bòid (genitive case of Bòd, the Gaelic name of the island of Bute) or Bòideach, denoting a person from Bute. Alternatively, the name may denote descendants of a Gilla filius Boed, who appears in reference to Glasgow Cathedral in the early 12th century, perhaps from the Gaelic personal name Boite, of uncertain origin.
Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic epithet buidhe ‘yellow(-haired)’. Compare Bowie .
Manx: from Mac Gille Buidhe ‘son of the yellow-haired lad’ (compare 2 above).

variants.name: Bowie
meanings: Scottish: from Gaelic buidhe ‘yellow’, i.e. ‘yellow-haired’, pronounced as two syllables. The equivalent term in Ireland is buí, often Anglicized as boy. The surname may also be a shortened form of Gilboy .
Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw was born about 1454, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock, was 30 and his mother, Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Christian Mure. He died in 1507, at the age of 54, and was buried in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw est né environ 1454, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Christian Mure. Il est décédé en 1507, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw um 1454 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock 30 und seine Mutter Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood 25. Er hatte mit Christian Mure mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1507 im Alter von 54 Jahren und wurde in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Boyd of Bonshawが約1454年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnockは30歳，母Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwoodは25歳であった。彼はChristian Mureとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1507年に54歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw(이)가 대략 1454년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Christian Mure(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Boyd of Bonshaw родился около 1454 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Boyd -1st Lord of Kilmarnock было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariotta Jonet Maxwell of Calderwood, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Christian Mure. Он умер в 1507 г. в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия.
